translated: Since the fan festa offer was withdrawn
and moved to another time, I actually feel a bit relieved.
I started thinking, "Oh, maybe they can do both now!" I probably shouldn't think that way,
but I can't help but feel a bit lucky.
Yeah, that's how I feel.
All right, I'd like to introduce another message.
Next is from Kopi-san.
Thank you very much.
They wrote, "Yukky, kon-needo!"
Kon-needo!
"I'm so excited that Leoni's long-awaited first solo live as pros is finally happening."
"Personally, I'd love to see them do an instrument-swap segment during the MC at the actual show."
That's what they sent in.
Thank you so much.
I'd definitely want to see that.
Wait, really?
Actually, maybe not.
If I were in their shoes, I'd be so incredibly nervous.
How should I put it?
If Shiho had to play drums, guitar, or keyboard
instead of bass, I wonder if she'd even go along with it.
She did it in the story because it was just a rehearsal, but since she's so good at music
and takes so much pride in it, I feel like her pride might get in the way
and she'd say she doesn't want to do it during the MC.
But I still want to see it.
I'd love to see her getting all flustered, wouldn't you?
Yeah, I want to see everyone struggling and saying they can't do it.
I feel like I could listen to that and watch it forever.
Yeah.
I hope they do it.
I wonder what they'll do.
I'm really looking forward to the future stories.
I can't even imagine Shiho-chan on the drums.
Oh...
That's true.
She seems good at keeping rhythm, so she might handle it okay,
but since your hands and feet have to move separately,
I wonder if she'd end up panicking anyway?
I'm curious.
I'd kind of like to see her on guitar, too.
Yeah.
I'd really like to see that.
It would be so cute to see her realize she can't do it.
Definitely.
For sure.
I'd really love to see that.
Everyone, please look forward to the future stories.
Thank you for the letter.
Man...
